calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-22-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of Minor.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Nici Rodich.
Petitioner: , Ying Zeng (Mother) present in pro per as Guardian at litem for Minor: Mang Fei Guan, was sworn and examined with the help of interpreter William Guan
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing including the father who also signed the petition.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: GARY MANGFEI KWAN.
Decree signed in open court.
